# Sample Agent

## Overview
EHR agent for patient retrieval.

## Quick Start
Run `python -m app.main`.

## Installation
Use pip install.

## Configuration
Set FHIR_BASE_URL.

## Tools & Data Sources
- `fetch_fhir_patient`: Reads from FHIR API.
- `debug_scratch_tool`: local debug helper.

## Examples
- "Fetch patient 123"

## Testing
`pytest`

## Safety and Compliance Notes
Handle sensitive data minimally.

## Repository Structure
- src/

## Versioning
Use git tags.
